mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `bank`.`account`( user_id, product_id, account_number, account_type, balance, interest_rate, maturity_date, account_password, status, password_fail_count, account_alias, created_at, last_transaction_at) VALUES (#{account.userId}, #{account.productId}, #{account.accountNumber}, #{account.accountType}, #{account.balance}, #{account.interestRate}, #{account.maturityDate}, #{account.accountPassword}, #{account.status}, #{account.passwordFailCount}, #{account.accountAlias}, #{account.createdAt}, #{account.lastTransactionAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT `t1`.account_id, `t1`.user_id, `t1`.product_id, `t1`.account_number, `t1`.account_type, `t1`.balance, `t1`.interest_rate, `t1`.maturity_date, `t1`.account_password, `t1`.status, `t1`.password_fail_count, `t1`.account_alias, `t1`.created_at, `t1`.last_transaction_at, `t2`.product_name, `t2`.product_category FROM `bank`.`account` `t1` LEFT JOIN `bank`.`financial_product` `t2` ON `t1`.product_id = `t2`.product_id WHERE `t1`.account_id = #{id}

SELECT `t1`.account_id, `t1`.user_id, `t1`.product_id, `t1`.account_number, `t1`.account_type, `t1`.balance, `t1`.interest_rate, `t1`.maturity_date, `t1`.account_password, `t1`.status, `t1`.password_fail_count, `t1`.account_alias, `t1`.created_at, `t1`.last_transaction_at, `t2`.product_name, `t2`.product_category FROM `bank`.`account` `t1` LEFT JOIN `bank`.`financial_product` `t2` ON `t1`.product_id = `t2`.product_id WHERE `t1`.account_number = #{accountNumber}

SELECT `t1`.account_id, `t1`.user_id, `t1`.product_id, `t1`.account_number, `t1`.account_type, `t1`.balance, `t1`.interest_rate, `t1`.maturity_date, `t1`.account_password, `t1`.status, `t1`.password_fail_count, `t1`.account_alias, `t1`.created_at, `t1`.last_transaction_at, `t2`.product_name, `t2`.product_category FROM `bank`.`account` `t1` LEFT JOIN `bank`.`financial_product` `t2` ON `t1`.product_id = `t2`.product_id WHERE `t1`.user_id = #{userId} AND `t1`.`account_type` = 'CHECKING' ORDER BY `t1`.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE `bank`.`account` SET balance = #{balance}, last_transaction_at = NOW() WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
UPDATE `bank`.`account` SET balance = balance + #{amount}, last_transaction_at = NOW() WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
mapper.select: SELECT account_id AS accountId, user_id AS userId, product_id AS productId, account_number AS accountNumber, account_type AS accountType, balance, interest_rate AS interestRate, maturity_date AS maturityDate, status FROM `bank`.`account` WHERE account_type = 'DEPOSIT' AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND DATE(maturity_date) <= #{today}
SELECT account_id AS accountId, linked_account_id AS linkedAccountId, maturity_treatment AS maturityTreatment FROM `bank`.`deposit_account` WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
mapper.update: UPDATE `bank`.`account` SET status = #{status}, balance = #{balance}, last_transaction_at = NOW() WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
